svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 628px; height: 1px; padding-top: 68px; margin-left: 242px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• APIs (Inference/Training)
• MCP/Tool Protocols & Tool Catalog
• Agent/Workflows (Task Decomposition)
• Policy as Intent: Limits, Priorities, Budgets, Compliance

div.div:
• Runtimes: Training, Fine-tuning, Inference Serving, Batch Processing, Agent Runtime
• State & Context: Cache / KV / Vector / Context Memory
• Observability Hooks: Tracing, Tokens, GPU Time, Network, Storage

div.div:
• Compute Governance: Quotas/Budgets, Isolation/Sharing, Preemption
• Scheduling: Topology-Aware Placement, Multi-Tenant, Fairness
• Infrastructure Tiers: Accelerators, Network, Storage + Context Tier (Optional)
• Controls: FinOps/SecOps/SRE - Cost, Risk, Policy, Audit
